summary: Comprehensive testing of Stripe Subscription Integration for FacturePro. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - exempt user shows 'Actif' status, trial users see trial banner and subscription page with 'S'abonner' button, clicking subscribe redirects to Stripe checkout (CA$15.00).
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - used existing exempt user and registered new trial users for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Subscription Integration fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/auth/me (returns subscription_status, is_exempt), GET /api/subscription/current (returns subscription info), POST /api/subscription/create-checkout (creates Stripe checkout session), GET /api/subscription/checkout-status/{session_id} (polls payment status), POST /api/webhook/stripe (webhook endpoint). Features verified: exempt user gussdub@gmail.com always has 'active' status, new users get 14-day trial, trial banner shows on dashboard, subscription page shows correct status badge ('Actif' for active, 'Essai gratuit' for trial), subscribe button redirects to Stripe checkout at CA$15.00/month.

exempt_user_flow.sidebar_nav: PASS - 'Abonnement' nav link visible in sidebar
exempt_user_flow.subscribe_button: PASS - Not visible for active/exempt user (correct behavior)

trial_user_flow.registration: PASS - New user can register successfully
trial_user_flow.trial_banner: PASS - Trial banner shows on dashboard with 'Essai gratuit' message

stripe_checkout.button_click: PASS - Clicking subscribe button initiates checkout

subscription: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info with subscription_status and is_exempt
GET /api/subscription/current - Returns subscription status, trial_end_date, is_exempt, last_payment
POST /api/subscription/create-checkout - Creates Stripe checkout session, returns url and session_id
GET /api/subscription/checkout-status/{session_id} - Returns checkout status and payment_status
POST /api/webhook/stripe - Stripe webhook endpoint (exists and responds)
verified_behavior: Exempt user (gussdub@gmail.com) always returns subscription_status='active' and is_exempt=true
New users get subscription_status='trial' with trial_end_date ~14 days from registration
Checkout session creates payment_transactions document in MongoDB with status='pending'
Stripe checkout URL is valid and shows correct price (CA$15.00)
All subscription endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)

mocked_apis: None - Stripe integration is real using sk_test_emergent test key
